description: UNISEX STYLING : Suitable for both men and women, this comfortable beanie hat can be worn as a classic turn up hat or a relaxed slouch beanie. Available in a wide range of colours giving you plenty of options to choose from. LIGHTWEIGHT : A double thickness of fine knit fabric helps trap warm air close to the head keeping you warm. Made from super soft eco friendly acrylic material. A lightweight hat which is easily packable so perfect for travel. SIZING : The hat is stretch fit and is perfect for head sizes 56-61 cm. High elasticity ensures a perfect fit with maximum comfort. USES : The perfect hat for all casual occasions and general day to day wear. Perfect for outdoor sporting activities such as walking, jogging/running, camping, sledging, skiing etc. Makes the perfect small gift in it’s own branded packaging. TOSKATOK QUALITY ASSURANCE : A high quality, robust product designed with the wearer in mind. If you are not 100% satisfied with your purchase we can guarantee a refund once returned. Please get in touch if you have any issues with this product
